response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong seniority and diverse systems programming experience, this role has two critical misalignments: the required native-level Japanese proficiency is completely absent from the resume, and the last decade has been focused on web/cloud development rather than embedded security or firmware. The candidate's C/embedded experience is over 10 years old (National Instruments 2014-2015), and there is no demonstrated background in security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols, device hardening) that are central to the role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering at senior/staff level with demonstrated ability to lead architecture and infrastructure work
Proven capability to quickly learn multiple programming languages and work across diverse technology stacks (C, C++, DLang, Java, JavaScript)
Strong systems and infrastructure expertise including Linux, CI/CD, container orchestration, and development environment setup
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed, despite being explicitly required; English-only technical capability is insufficient for the role
Recent 10-year career heavily focused on web/cloud and high-level languages; embedded systems experience is 10+ years old and appears limited to robotic arms rather than firmware/networking
No demonstrated security domain expertise; resume contains no mention of encryption, authentication protocols, network security, or any of the required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)

key_factors.factor: 10-year gap from embedded/firmware work; recent focus on web/cloud
No security domain knowledge or experience with required technologies
